title: builder: separate publish-time release tooling from the shipped product
description: builder relocates the publish-time identity guard out of the shipped product to repo-root release tooling, repointing the publish hook (prepublishOnly) and the guard's version-read, so the published package becomes product-only (the guard no longer ships to consumers). Cleans the guard to the code standard as it moves. Gates: package-qa (manifest re-baselines to product-only; the guard still runs at our publish) + code-standards both PASS.
acceptance_criteria: the publish-time guard no longer ships in the package tarball (package-qa manifest re-baseline PASS)
the publish hook + version-read repointed; the guard still fires at our publish via prepublishOnly
the relocated guard conforms to CODE_STANDARDS.md (code-standards PASS)
no secret committed; global npm config untouched
